title: alyssum canariense
intro: Alyssum canariense, also known as Canary Island alyssum, is a perennial flowering plant native to the Canary Islands, belonging to the family Brassicaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Alyssum canariense include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce stress, and improve respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Alyssum canariense is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often made by steeping the plant's leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
